2279160.name: Twistales
2279160.description: “On the day of what she believed to be her ‘Happy ending’, Cinderella witnesses the collapse of her universe and the murder of her beloved. With the help of a magic grimoire, in search of the truth, she walks into various fairy tales, through worlds that are now disturbing and enigmatic. Fighting enemies corrupted by a strange curse, the princess becomes a mighty warrior, determined to resolve this chaos.”
2279160.supported_languages:
英语*, 法语*, 德语
*具有完全音频支持的语言
